hero.title: Create Magic with
hero.subtitle: AI Coloring Pages
hero.description: Transform your imagination into beautiful, unique coloring pages. Safe, educational, and endlessly creative for children of all ages.

aiPowered.title: AI-Powered Generation
aiPowered.description: Create unique coloring pages instantly with advanced AI technology.

highQuality.title: High-Quality Downloads
highQuality.description: Download crisp, print-ready PDFs perfect for any printer.

childSafe.title: Child-Safe Content
childSafe.description: All content is moderated and designed specifically for children.

educational.title: Educational Value
educational.description: Promote creativity, focus, and learning through coloring.

generate.title: AI Smart Coloring Page Generator
generate.subtitle: Tell me what you want to draw, and AI will create a unique coloring page for you!

form.promptLabel: What do you want to draw?
form.promptPlaceholder: For example: A cute kitten playing in a garden...
form.promptRequired: Please describe the content you want for the coloring page

status.aiEnabledDesc: Will use real AI technology to generate unique coloring pages for you
status.demoModeDesc: To enable real AI generation, configure VITE_REPLICATE_API_KEY in .env file

result.title: Your Exclusive Coloring Page
result.tip: Tip: Recommend using A4 paper for printing, set printer to 'black and white' mode for best results!
result.placeholder: Your coloring page will appear here
result.placeholderDesc: Fill out the form on the left and click generate to start creating

aiStatus.estimatedTime: Estimated time: 30-120 seconds, please wait patiently

specific.title: Be Specific
specific.description: Describe in detail what you want, like 'a kitten wearing a hat with an umbrella in the rain'

age.title: Choose Right Age
age.description: Younger children need simple patterns, older children can handle complex patterns

print.title: Best for Printing
print.description: Generated coloring pages are optimized for printing, better experience on paper
